items.title: 1 Reason to Buy Warren Buffett's Company, Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B)
items.author: Selena Maranjian
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway, led by Warren Buffett, has an impressive 60-year track record of generating nearly 20% annual returns. With a diverse portfolio of businesses and stocks, the company remains a promising long-term investment despite upcoming leadership transition.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong historical performance, diverse business portfolio, reasonable valuation, and planned leadership succession

items.title: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway Now Makes $816M Per Year From Coca-Cola Dividends — On An Investment of $1.3B
items.description: Warren Buffett’s investment powerhouse, Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.A) (BRK.B), continues to reap significant rewards from its stake in Coca-Cola (KO) in 2025.

items.title: Janus Henderson Balanced Fund Q2 2025 Commentary
items.description: Janus Henderson shares how active shifts in AI and fixed income drove strong Q2 returns. See how dynamic allocation can help you stay ahead.
